```{=latex}
\input{build/generated-title.tex}
```

# Experience

```{=latex}
\input{build/generated-experience.tex}
```

# Education

```{=latex}
\input{build/generated-education.tex}
```

# Publications

```{=latex}
\input{build/generated-publications.tex}
```

# Public Talks

```{=latex}
\input{build/generated-talks.tex}
```

# Teaching Experience

```{=latex}
\input{build/generated-teaching.tex}
```

# Awards

```{=latex}
\input{build/generated-awards.tex}
```
